title: Manager, Product Manager — Agent Platforms
context: Led modernization of an enterprise agent platform serving 1,000+ agents across a regulated, data-sensitive environment.
whatIOwned: Platform modernization strategy, backlog translation for 350+ workflows, data contracts and API design, prioritization across engineering, operations, risk, and compliance.
decisionsThatMattered: Decomposing 350+ complex workflows into a parallel execution backlog across 6 teams without service disruption
Tradeoffs between modernization pace and operational risk in a highly regulated environment
outcome: 1,000+ agents on the modernized platform with minimal disruption. Average handle time reduced by roughly 4 minutes per account.
whatILearned: How small workflow decisions compound at scale

title: Senior Associate, PM — Enterprise Messaging
context: Platform-level product for an ML-powered enterprise messaging system supporting 100+ product and marketing teams.
whatIOwned: Product discovery, roadmap, and full redesign of self-service analytics and tooling.
decisionsThatMattered: Identifying where campaign analytics, experimentation outputs, and actual user decision-making diverged
Which internal-facing capabilities would most reduce analyst dependency for 100+ teams
outcome: Teams could independently target, evaluate, and optimize cross-channel campaigns without analyst support.
whatILearned: Building mental models for complex data systems

title: Associate, PM — Recoveries
context: Product for recoveries operations directly affecting customer balances, payment plans, and settlement flows.
whatIOwned: Offer flow redesign, the first digital experience for customers using debt settlement providers, regulatory compliance alignment.
decisionsThatMattered: Redesigning offer flows to align business outcomes and customer needs without compromising compliance
What the first digital experience for this segment needed to communicate to be genuinely useful
outcome: Roughly $20M in additional monthly recoveries while maintaining regulatory compliance.
whatILearned: Balancing customer experience with hard business constraints
Defining first-of-kind digital experiences in regulated spaces
